## Language / Framework
Name and version of the language or framework.

## Common Vulnerability Patterns
List security patterns specific to this language/framework that the scanner should detect.

## Example Code
Provide sample vulnerable code snippets if possible.

## References
Links to OWASP guides, CVEs, or security documentation for this stack.
